% re-run the script on the trace to refresh. Each macro maps 1:1 to a computed value.

\newcommand{\avgtollcallsperrequest}{10.8\xspace}  % 10.800 tool calls/turn
\newcommand{\avgtimeperrequest}{4.3\xspace}  % 4.259 min mean e2e
\newcommand{\pntimeperrequest}{6.4\xspace}  % 6.376 min p90 e2e
\newcommand{\mediancachedinputtokens}{119K\xspace}  % 118,656 median prefix tokens
\newcommand{\medianuncachedinputtokens}{875\xspace}  % 875 median append tokens
\newcommand{\medianoutputtokens}{214\xspace}  % 214 median output tokens
\newcommand{\mediandecodespeed}{40.7\xspace}  % 40.693 tok/s median normalized decode
\newcommand{\mediancodecdecodespeed}{61.3\xspace}  % 61.265 tok/s median post-reasoning decode (Codex)
\newcommand{\mediancodecdecodespeedttft}{3.1\xspace}  % 3.100 s median TTFT residual (Codex)
\newcommand{\totaltoolcatetory}{80\xspace}  % 85 distinct raw tool names (floored to 80)
\newcommand{\topthreetoolpercent}{80\%\xspace}  % Claude top-3 82.76%, Codex top-3 94.60% (floored to 80%)
\newcommand{\toolcallslongerthanonemin}{4\xspace}  % 3.97% of tool calls >1 min
\newcommand{\toolcallslongerthanoneminpercent}{85\%\xspace}  % 84.68% of tool time from >1 min calls
